title: storage — permissions
description: Tenant-facing file permissions + platform-admin permissions. Every tenant-scoped route composes one of the tenant permissions; every platform-admin route composes one of the platform permissions.

permissions.name: files.view
permissions.description: Read a single file + issue a standard-TTL signed URL for download / preview.

permissions.name: files.update
permissions.description: Update mutable file fields (name, visibility, metadata) on own files. Admins can update any file.

permissions.name: files.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete own files. Admins can delete any file.

permissions.name: files.admin
permissions.description: Elevated actions: reprocess variants, bulk revoke signed URLs, issue long-TTL / IP-locked / one-time signed URLs, download infected files (with acknowledgment), update / delete any file regardless of ownership.

permissions.name: platform.storage.view
permissions.description: Cross-tenant file + variant + signed-url-audit read. Antivirus dashboard access.

permissions.name: platform.storage.manage
permissions.description: Platform-side write actions: rescan, quarantine, hard-delete bypassing retention, force reconcile-quota.
